title: TrackerConnection
description: Workspace ↔ external project tracker binding (OAuth state + provider capabilities). One object per connected provider per workspace. Provider-agnostic shape; tagged by `provider` field. V1 only emits `linear`.

provider.description: Tracker provider id. Add more enum values as `engine/houston-<provider>` crates ship.

org_name.description: Human-readable org name for UI display.

app_user_id.description: Linear AppUser UUID — Houston-as-app identity in the connected org. Populated after first agentSessionRegister call.

capabilities.description: Provider feature flags: issues, projects, initiatives, cycles, milestones, subtasks, webhooks, agent_session, custom_fields, etc. UI gates features on presence.

oauth_access_token_ref.description: Opaque ref to macOS keychain entry. The token itself never lives on disk.

webhook_secret_ref.description: Opaque ref to keychain entry for HMAC webhook secret.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted. Linear: read, write, app:assignable, app:mentionable, webhook:write.
